regional_cost_note: Painters in Napier typically charge $42–$65/hr. Rates are elevated post-Cyclone Gabrielle due to high rebuild demand and tight painter supply. Art Deco and heritage properties cost 15–25% more due to specialist plaster repairs, decorative moulding work and heritage colour matching. Coastal suburbs like Ahuriri and Bluff Hill add prep costs for salt-air damage.

businesses.name: Eric Wiig Ltd
businesses.known_for: Hawke’s Bay’s most established painting firm — trading since 1948; Gold-level Nuplex contractor and Registered Master Painters specialising in painting, resin flooring and waterproofing.

businesses.name: Colourcraft Ltd
businesses.known_for: 30+ years as a leading residential and commercial contractor; Dulux-accredited and Master Painters member covering Napier, Hastings, Havelock North and greater Hawke’s Bay.

businesses.name: Gearey Painting Co Ltd
businesses.known_for: Locally owned and operated for 25+ years; experienced across residential, commercial and industrial painting throughout the Hawke’s Bay region.

businesses.name: K T Painting & Decorating
businesses.known_for: Specialises in interior decorating, painting, paperhanging and plastering; consistently high-rated across Napier and Taradale.

businesses.name: Adrian Ireland Decorating Ltd
businesses.known_for: Locally owned company covering the whole Hawke’s Bay region; focuses on high-quality residential and commercial painting with guaranteed customer satisfaction.

businesses.name: Brush & Beyond
businesses.known_for: 9-year qualified painter delivering meticulous interior and exterior painting plus wallpapering; strong reputation for attention to detail on Napier residential projects.

businesses.name: Bay Decorating Ltd
businesses.known_for: Family-owned Hawke’s Bay business providing painting, decorating and colour consultancy services with a focus on dependability and trust.

businesses.name: NextLevel Painting
businesses.known_for: Small, friendly team delivering high-quality residential and commercial painting from Art Deco restorations to modern builds across Napier, Havelock North and Taradale.
